description: This file defines a 'Services' class that sets up microservices and related AWS resources using AWS CDK constructs, including API Gateway resources, Lambda functions, IAM roles, and policies for a serverless SaaS application.

classes.name: Services
classes.description: A CDK construct that sets up microservices, IAM roles, and API Gateway resources for product and order services, as well as user management roles with Cognito integration.

methods.name: constructor
methods.description: Initializes the Services construct, creating microservices for products and orders, setting up IAM roles and policies, and configuring API Gateway resources and Lambda functions for user management.
